title: デビュー戦の後に・喧嘩道中始まりでい

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I knew Inari was going to do well. What a
wonderful debut. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I agree. Watching her was really motivating. She
ran so well.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh, hehe... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This is amazin'! So this is how a real race, a real
festival feels! I can't get enough!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And this is just the debut! What's gonna happen
to me once I dive into an even bigger festival?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Gaaaah! Who woulda thought?! This is so wild!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to check in with Inari One after her
spectacular debut race.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Inari One, reportin' back from my successful
fireworks show!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta hear this, Boss! I'm finished runnin',
but I'm so ready for more!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta hear this, Boss! I'm finished runnin',
but I'm so ready for more!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I need more festivals... way more! I've got so much adrenaline! I gotta get back out there and run!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oooooh, I'm so ready to run again! Next time, I'm
puttin' on an even bigger fireworks display!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is bursting with energy, despite having
just finished a race! I should take advantage of
this.
choice_data_list: Once we get back, it's straight to training then!
Once we get back, it's straight to training then!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I knew you'd understand, Boss! Let's talk
about how to improve my runnin' and then get
straight to work!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I knew you'd understand, Boss! Let's talk
about how to improve my runnin' and then get
straight to work!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Strike while the iron's hot! I'm gonna go change so
we can hit the road!
